purpose: Constrain 4.0 right-side explanations as target-bound designer-facing notes.

rules.targetRequired: Every note must target an interface element id, not only the whole interface.
rules.basisRequired: Every note states whether it came from explicit source, visible prototype evidence, inferred gap, conflict, design risk, or generated rule.
rules.noGenericTargetAlone: Targets such as button, area, text, or screen are too generic unless bound to a stable targetElementId.
rules.bodyNoMeta: Do not write meta instructions such as draw this, AI should, left side, or right side.
rules.semanticTag: Tags are selected from note body and target semantics, not copied from template defaults. Use the interaction-spec-generator attention taxonomy when choosing discipline labels.
rules.templateTagStyle: Figma output must use template discipline-tag components and numbered-note components; hand-drawn black label rectangles are not acceptable.
rules.completeInteractionExplanation: Across notes for each interface, cover purpose, module composition, key states, player actions, post-action changes, feedback, and AI pending confirmations.
rules.aiPendingIndependent: AI待确认 remains an explicit red warning note and must not be diluted into ordinary attention notes.
